documents.title: New Movies 2026
documents.text: Solar Drift is a science fiction film directed by Anna Kovacs. Neon Skies is a cyberpunk thriller directed by Mark Liu. The Last Horizon is a space drama directed by Sofia Mendes. Ember Falls is a fantasy adventure directed by Daniel Rowe. Silent Orbit is a mystery sci-fi film directed by Irene Novak. Glass Harbor is a detective drama directed by Thomas Vale. Iron Bloom is a dystopian feature directed by Rachel Kim. Moonline Echo is an experimental sci-fi film directed by Pavel Orlov.

documents.title: Movie Details
documents.text: Solar Drift stars Lena Hart and Ivan Petrov. Neon Skies stars Maya Chen. The Last Horizon stars Olivia Stone. Ember Falls stars Noah Reid. Silent Orbit stars Eliza Moore. Glass Harbor stars Victor Hale. Iron Bloom stars Sara Nordin. Moonline Echo stars Anton Belik.

documents.title: Personal Watchlist
documents.text: My personal watchlist for this season is: 1. Silent Orbit 2. Solar Drift 3. Ember Falls 4. Glass Harbor 5. Neon Skies 6. The Last Horizon 7. Iron Bloom 8. Moonline Echo.

documents.title: Favorite Books
documents.text: Favorite books include Dune by Frank Herbert, Foundation by Isaac Asimov, Hyperion by Dan Simmons, and The Left Hand of Darkness by Ursula K. Le Guin.

documents.title: Travel Notes
documents.text: I want to visit Lisbon, Kyoto, and Reykjavik next year. Lisbon is known for trams, Kyoto for temples, and Reykjavik for geothermal spas.

documents.title: Random Notes
documents.text: Bananas are yellow. Mechanical keyboards can sound very different depending on switches. Rainy days are good for reading.
